'''Ryn one-one-five''' was the codename of a member of the [[Ryn Network]] operating on [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] he helped engineer the prisoner escape on [[Selvaris]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
